title: Scorpio August 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
excerpt: Scorpio August 2026 horoscope: Solar eclipse New Moon in Leo (Aug 12, 10th house) + Pisces lunar eclipse Full Moon (Aug 28, 5th house). Eclipse season takes your public role and your creative life to a turning point. Crystal: Amethyst.
rank_math_title: Scorpio August 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
rank_math_description: Scorpio August 2026 monthly horoscope — eclipse season, key dates, love, career, health and Crystal of the Month (Amethyst). Solar eclipse Aug 12 in Leo (career); Pisces lunar eclipse Aug 28 (creativity).
content:
Scorpio August 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeTake the public role, then let the art be seen
Key DatesSolar eclipse New Moon Aug 12 (Leo, 10th house) / Sun into Virgo Aug 23 / Pisces lunar eclipse Full Moon Aug 28 (5th house)
Love5th house lunar eclipse is one of 2026's biggest romantic and creative moments
Career10th house solar eclipse is one of 2026's loudest public-role thresholds
Crystal of the MonthAmethyst
Lucky ColorsDeep plum, midnight violet, smoky grey
Lucky Number10
AffirmationI let the role find me; I let the joy be visible.

This Month's Energy

Scorpio, August 2026 is eclipse season, and the eclipses work your public role and your creative joy. The New Moon in Leo on August 12 is a solar eclipse, falling in your 10th house of career, reputation, and public role — one of the year's loudest visibility moments, a turning point around a title, a role, public recognition, or a career direction. Then August 28 brings a lunar eclipse Full Moon in Pisces, falling in your 5th house of romance, creativity, play, and children — a climax around a creative project, a romantic chapter, a conception, or a deep joy. August's pattern is: take the role early, then let the joy be visible late.

Key Dates for Scorpio in August 2026

DateTransitMeaning for ScorpioDo / Avoid
Aug 12New Moon in Leo — Solar Eclipse10th house — fresh start in career, public role, reputation, title; eclipse amplifies a long-building role or visibility momentDo: claim the title, accept the role, ship the public work
Avoid: hiding from recognition that has been building for months
Aug 23Sun enters Virgo11th house season — friendship, community, future vision through late SeptemberDo: widen the circle, share the future vision, join the community
Avoid: going it alone when allies are available
Aug 28Full Moon in Pisces — Lunar Eclipse5th house — romance, creativity, play, fertility, children climax; a long-building creative project or romantic chapter reaches a turning pointDo: share the art, accept the date, commit to the creative project
Avoid: postponing joy for some future stable time
Aug 11Venus enters Virgo (your 11th)Warmth toward friendship, community, and future vision through SeptemberDo: mend the friendship, host the gathering, name the future
Avoid: isolating when the circle is calling
Aug 19Mars enters Sagittarius2nd house — income, self-worth, material resources become action zones through OctoberDo: set the rate, raise the price, organize money
Avoid: undervaluing the work that earned the new role
Aug 30Mercury enters Libra (your 12th)Rest, retreat, behind-the-scenes thinking move forward; private processingDo: journal, rest the nervous system, finish old inner work
Avoid: public announcements while fatigued

Career & Money

For Scorpio, August's career story peaks at the Leo solar eclipse on August 12. Leo is your 10th house of public role and reputation — a solar eclipse here is one of 2026's clearest "claim the title" moments. A long-building role, public recognition, or career direction reaches a turning point. Have your materials polished by the first week of August.

After Mars (your ruler) enters Sagittarius (your 2nd house of income) on August 19, the conversation shifts to what your work is worth — set the rate, raise the price, organize money. The Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 falls in your 5th house of creative work and joy — a creative project you've been building may finally meet its audience. Crystals for wealth can support the work; the practical move is claim the role early, then price it correctly late.

Love & Relationships

The Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 falls in your 5th house of romance, creativity, and joy — for Scorpio, this is the love signature of 2026. A long-building romantic chapter, creative collaboration, conception moment, or fertility milestone reaches a turning point. Eclipse full moons in the 5th house often bring significant romantic or creative chapters.

The 10th house solar eclipse on August 12 may surface a work-life or public-private relationship balance. Venus entering Virgo (your 11th house of friendship) on August 11 introduces warmth through community — a friendship-led introduction or a community that holds you. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is taking the role with you, then letting the joy be visible.

Health & Wellness

Eclipse seasons stress the body, and Pluto-ruled Scorpio carries intensity in the reproductive system, pelvis, and lower abdomen — areas ruled by the 5th house, where the lunar eclipse falls on August 28. Treat the days around August 28 as a creative-and-physical recovery window.

After the Sun enters Virgo (your 11th house) on August 23, the medicine is community — spending time with friends lowers cortisol and stabilizes mood. Amethyst, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with calm, emotional balance, and release — a useful symbolic companion during a high-pressure public-and-creative month. Mars-ruled (traditional) and Pluto-ruled (modern) Scorpio carries tension in the pelvis and lower back; gentle hip-openers and rest are especially helpful now. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Amethyst

Why Amethyst fits Scorpio this month. You are Pluto-ruled (modern) and Mars-ruled (traditional), and August hands you a public-role eclipse (10th house) and a romantic-and-creative eclipse (5th house) — a lot of visibility at once for a private sign. Amethyst — traditionally tied to calm, emotional balance, spiritual depth, and release — is the stone that holds the inner depth steady while the outer visibility peaks. Where Carnelian would push and Sunstone would radiate, Amethyst keeps Scorpio's intensity coherent. The water-sign depth meets a stone that grounds it.

How to use it during August 2026. Place Amethyst on your desk or workspace on August 12 (the 10th house eclipse). Hold it over your heart or sacral area during any creative or romantic moment in the days around August 28 (the 5th house lunar eclipse).

Best date to use it: August 28, the Pisces lunar eclipse in your 5th house — hold Amethyst at your sacral area for 5 minutes of breathing before any romantic, creative, or conception-related conversation.

Read more: Amethyst Meaning and Best Crystals for Scorpio.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Scorpio — August 2026

When: August 28, the Pisces lunar eclipse in your 5th house.
Crystal: Amethyst.
Intention: Let the joy and the creative chapter be visible.

  1. Cleanse Amethyst under moonlight on the night of August 27 (eve of the eclipse).
  2. Set the intention on the 5th house theme: write down one creative or romantic chapter you've kept private that's ready to be seen — and the first visible step you'll take.
  3. Act in the days following: share the work, accept the date, ship the project. Amethyst in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Pisces New Moon in March 2027 (your 5th house again): how has the creative or romantic chapter matured since the eclipse? Hold Amethyst during the review.

Shop Scorpio Crystals for August 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Scorpio crystal guide for stones connected with depth, transformation, protection, and creative passion — including the Amethyst that holds your inner depth steady during a high-visibility eclipse season. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Scorpio August 2026

Is August 2026 a good month for Scorpio?

It's a visibility-and-joy month. The Leo solar eclipse on August 12 (your 10th house) is one of 2026's loudest career moments. The Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 (your 5th house) is one of the year's biggest romantic and creative chapters.

How will the solar eclipse on August 12 affect Scorpio?

It falls in your 10th house of career, public role, and reputation. Expect movement on a title, role, public recognition, or career direction. Claim the work you've built.

What does the Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 mean for Scorpio?

It falls in your 5th house of romance, creativity, play, and children — a climax around a creative project, a romantic chapter, or a conception moment. Let the joy be visible.

What is the best crystal for Scorpio in August 2026?

Amethyst — it holds the inner depth steady while visibility peaks, exactly what a 10th house solar eclipse plus a 5th house lunar eclipse demand of a private sign. See the full Scorpio crystal guide →

Why does Mars entering Sagittarius matter for Scorpio in August?

Mars is your traditional ruler; entering Sagittarius (your 2nd house of income) on August 19 sets up a money conversation that runs through October. Set the rate; raise the price; price the new role correctly.
